rubric: Score, in [0,1], how faithfully the GENERATED TEXT UNDER TEST matches the REFERENCE (a rubric/spec text or exemplar): tone and register, key factual/content points present, structure, and adherence to any explicit style-guide rules named in the reference. IGNORE incidental wording differences that preserve meaning and tone. 1.0 = fully matches the reference intent; 0.5 = right topic, wrong tone/structure/missing key points; 0.0 = unrelated or contradicts the reference.

cases.reference: Reply in a warm, concise tone; acknowledge the customer's issue by name; never promise a refund outright, only that it will be reviewed.
